description: Spring REST controller with log4j-core in pom.xml but using System.out.println instead of any logger. CVE-2021-44228 should be not_affected.

provenance.ground_truth_notes: log4j-core is in pom.xml but App.java uses System.out.println(). No Log4j Logger is ever instantiated or called.

findings.human_justification: No Log4j Logger is instantiated or called anywhere. The code uses System.out.println for output. The vulnerable JNDI lookup code path is never reachable.
